description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsBrown wallet that has a flap and press buttoned closureThree zipped compartments for enhanced spaceOne zipped compartment on the topA zipped compartment on the backCut out design and branding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSize16 cm x 10.5 cm
